name: allneurons
description: Mini-Mike — a set of AI skills built specifically for legal work, plugging into Claude (via Claude Cowork or Claude Code) so lawyers get the precision their work demands without leaving the platform they already use. Built by allNeurons, a team of MAANG engineers and practicing lawyers.

plugins.name: mini-mike
plugins.description: Reviews commercial contracts and produces a structured Excel workbook: a General Key Terms tabular review (parent skill, mm-tabular-review) with section citations, plus an optional Change of Control / Transfer deep-dive (child skill, mm-coc-tabular-review) for M&A diligence. Supports batch processing, password-protected files, and contracts with amendments.
